allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "Tamanho do log:"; \(Get-Item metro-debug.log\).Length; Write-Output "Modificado em:"; \(Get-Item metro-debug.log\).LastWriteTime; Write-Output "Agora:"; Get-Date)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mixkit.co/free-sound-effects/correct/" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'https://assets\\.mixkit\\.co/[^\\"''<>\\s]+\\.\(?:mp3|wav\)'\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value -Unique | Select-Object -First 20 } catch { "ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mixkit.co/free-sound-effects/wrong/" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'https://assets\\.mixkit\\.co/[^\\"''<>\\s]+\\.\(?:mp3|wav\)'\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value -Unique | Select-Object -First 20 } catch { "ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mixkit.co/free-sound-effects/game/" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'https://assets\\.mixkit\\.co/[^\\"''<>\\s]+\\.\(?:mp3|wav\)'\) | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value -Unique | Select-Object -First 30 } catch { "ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mixkit.co/free-sound-effects/correct/" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $r.Content.Substring\(0,2000\))
